## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] chore: Maintenance/tooling
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] breaking: Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Pre-commit checks pass (`make check`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
